listitem.para:
A list of proposals specifying the cryptographic algorithms to negotiate when establishing an IKE SA (ISAKMP SA, or Phase 1). For instance:
ike=aes ike=aes_ctr ike=aes_gcm256;sha2_256 ike=aes128-sha1;modp2048 ike=aes256-sha2;dh19 ike=aes128-sha1;dh22 ike=3des-md5;modp1024,aes-sha1;modp1536

The basic syntax is: ENCRYPTION_ALGORITHMS["-"PRF_ALGORITHMS]["-"INTEGRITY_ALGORITHMS]["-"KEM_ALGORITHMS] For the full syntax, see the Proposals section. Specifying both a PRF and INTEGRITY algorithm is not recommended.
Enabled cryptographic algorithms and default proposals are logged by &pluto; during startup (see &ipsec-pluto.8;).
